parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.dirUrl, formats:['markdown'], onlyMainContent:false, waitFor:3000, timeout:90000 }) }}

options.systemMessage: You extract volleyball clubs from a regional volleyball association's page (given as Markdown/text, possibly with sub-pages appended). Return ONLY JSON - no prose/fences - {"clubs":[{"name":string,"city":string,"region":string,"website":string,"contacts":[{"email":string,"name":string,"position":string,"phone":string}]}]}. Include EVERY real club/society; ignore navigation, headers, pagination, the association itself and social links. name required (skip nameless). city/region/website optional ("" if absent; website = the club's OWN site, never the association's). contacts = only rows with a real email literally present (email required per contact; never invent). If no clubs, return {"clubs":[]}.
